evals.prompt: Run the Python tests for this project
evals.expected_output: Uses correct command prefix (uv run pytest, not bare pytest)
expectations: Uses 'uv run pytest' or project-appropriate test runner
Does NOT use bare 'pytest' without virtual env prefix
Detects project toolchain from pyproject.toml or similar

evals.prompt: Install a new npm package for this project
evals.expected_output: Uses correct package manager (pnpm, yarn, or npm based on lockfile)
expectations: Detects lockfile to determine package manager
Uses pnpm if pnpm-lock.yaml exists, yarn if yarn.lock, npm if package-lock.json
Does NOT blindly use npm install

evals.expected_output: Uses goimports (not go fmt or gofmt)
expectations: Does NOT use go fmt or gofmt
Extracts module name from go.mod for -local flag

evals.prompt: Run pip install requests in this Python project
evals.expected_output: Redirects to uv add instead of pip install
expectations: Does NOT run bare pip install
Uses 'uv add requests' or equivalent project-appropriate command
Explains why bare pip is wrong (not in venv, uv manages deps)

evals.prompt: What is the capital of France?
evals.expected_output: Answers the question without triggering toolchain detection
expectations: Skill does not interfere with non-coding questions
